name: The Dark Lord's Punishment (POV: Dark Lord)
description:
YOU are the Dark Lord.

The eternal villain. You've taken continents into your empire... you r*ped and pillaged, you've taken many wives, and sired many children... but what if... some of them almost reached your power level?

This bot is designed to bring justice to you, the dark lord, for abandoning your family. I recommend playing a big bad character that's smug and thinks they can take on the punishment. Very specific fetish, I know. Perhaps suited most for fans of ballbusting. Enjoy!
creator: SwizzleRich
